name: Easy Sweet'n Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Chicken thighs, boneless and skin-on
1 pound Package Shelled Peas or Frozen Mixed Vegetables, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a slow cooker.
2. Pour sweet 'n sour sauce over the chicken.
3. Add vegetables and cooked rice.
4. Cover; cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours, or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
5. Increase heat to high and stir vegetables for an additional 10 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
6. Serve hot over rice.
